interpretation.detection_rate_pct: % of known conifer destinations with at least one cluster in 5km buffer (target >= 85%)
interpretation.single_cluster_rate_pct: % of detected forests captured as a SINGLE cluster (higher = less fragmented; target >= 70%)
interpretation.tight_placement_pct: % of detected forests with nearest cluster centroid within 5km (target >= 80%)
interpretation.area_accuracy_pct: % of detected forests where cluster area is within 0.3x-3x of Wikipedia area (target >= 60%)
interpretation.median_area_ratio_cluster_vs_expected: primary cluster area / Wikipedia area. Below 1.0 = our conifer-only filter excludes broadleaf parts of the park.
interpretation.mixed_sites_with_conifer_cluster: mixed broadleaf+conifer forests where we (correctly) found a conifer plantation cluster
